data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. KINGSBRAE TED goes very well this course and distance starting 25 times for 12 wins and 10 minors. Recorded a 9 length win (17.02) in a NG last time at this track. Looks well placed and should feature. 1. CALLA NAUGHTY produced a slick 20.01 when filling a minor placing over 350m at Grafton last start. Bold showing expected again. 3. KIARNI BOLT has performed well at his last couple of runs here, most recently when second beaten 4 lengths (17.56). Ran one of the fastest times on the program last start despite finishing in the minors. Overdue and gets his chance. 2. MIDWEEK SCOTCHES has won at this course and distance – sure to figure prominently.","runners":[8,1,3,2],"exclusive":false}
